summary: Game Tile Final Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is turned ON
AND the user is on the Home page

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to an archive game tile in the Games Carousel
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Game <x> of <y>, <away_team>,<home_team>. Press select to play game. Move <appropriate_directions> to navigate to a new item. Move up or down to browse new content."
